caption: In the video, a medical professional dressed in blue scrubs and wearing a face mask is seated and engaged in a conversation with another individual who is also wearing a face mask. The person in scrubs appears to be holding some documents or papers, possibly reviewing them while speaking. The setting seems to be a clinical or healthcare environment, indicated by the attire and the context of the discussion. The interaction suggests a consultation or briefing, with both individuals actively participating and exchanging information. The text "Day 5" and "Sim Week" on the screen implies that this scene is part of a simulation exercise or training week, likely aimed at preparing for real-life medical scenarios.
